overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city district at night. The character traverses sidewalks and crosses a multi-lane avenue surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and illuminated sky bridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with holographic billboards

events.description: green sports car drives past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking toward the camera, passing by closely

entered.detail: large illuminated gantry sign spanning the street with 'SEOCHO' text
tropical palm trees in concrete planters lining the sidewalk
massive vertical holographic advertisement showing a face with 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' text
tall futuristic skyscraper with cyan neon lighting and glass facade
tall illuminated post with white glowing panels

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. Neon signs and holographic billboards illuminate the scene, including a prominent overhead 'SEOCHO' sign. Palm trees line the walkway while pedestrians pass by, and the glass towers rise on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk across multi-lane avenue

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the multi-lane street
multiple vehicles pass through the intersection including a white SUV and purple sedan

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide avenue via the yellow crosswalk, moving from the left sidewalk to the right sidewalk while traffic flows around

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown leather jacket crossing the street ahead of the character
green sports car driving past the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: road surface with bold yellow diagonal stripes marking the pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide multi-lane avenue on a yellow-striped crosswalk. Traffic flows in both directions with various futuristic vehicles passing by. The perspective shifts as the character moves from the left side to the right side of the street, with the large holographic billboards now appearing closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with elevated sky bridges between towers

events.description: character steps onto the right sidewalk, completing the street crossing
camera tilts upward to focus on the illuminated sky bridges connecting the towers above

agents.ego_description: walking along the right sidewalk then stopping to look up at the architecture, observing the sky bridges between buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking ahead along the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic enclosed walkway with glass walls and cyan lighting connecting two skyscrapers
paved pedestrian walkway on the right side of the avenue with yellow curb

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the right sidewalk of the futuristic avenue, passing under towering structures. The camera then tilts upward to reveal impressive illuminated sky bridges connecting the glass towers high above. The neon-lit architecture dominates the view as the character observes the cyberpunk cityscape from street level looking up toward the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district that shifts from a street-level stroll to an expansive view of the towering skyline. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and glass towers, passing beneath a prominent holographic SEOCHO sign. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions to a wide multi-lane avenue where they cross a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst a flow of futuristic traffic. The perspective then shifts to the opposite sidewalk, bringing the massive holographic billboards into closer view as the character continues their journey. Finally, the camera tilts upward from the street level to reveal illuminated sky bridges connecting the glass skyscrapers high above against the night sky.
